name: Filter
comment:
Useful ways to combine filters (also known as predicates)!

@docs Filter, all, and, any, array, by, custom, eq, fail, gt, list, lt, not, or, pass, test

unions.name: Filter
unions.comment: A `Filter` takes a value `a` and determines whether it should pass or fail.

values.name: and
values.type: Filter.Filter a -> Filter.Filter a -> Filter.Filter a

values.name: any
values.comment: Pass if at least one filter passes.

values.name: array
values.comment: Keep items that pass the filter.
values.type: Filter.Filter a -> Array.Array a -> Array.Array a

values.name: by
values.comment:
Filter a value by a derived property, like its height.

    bob =
        { height = 5 }

    isTall =
        by .height <| gt 6

    test isTall bob
    -- False

values.name: custom
values.comment: Sometimes the building blocks in this library aren't enough!

values.name: eq
values.comment: Test whether a value is equal to `item`.

values.name: gt
values.comment: Test whether a value is greater than `num`.

values.name: list
values.comment: Keep items that do pass the filter.
values.type: Filter.Filter a -> List.List a -> List.List a

values.name: lt
values.comment: Test whether a value is less than `num`.

values.name: not
values.comment: Flip the outcome of a filter; if it fails it passes, and if it passes it fails.

values.name: or
values.comment: Pass if at least one filter passes.
values.type: Filter.Filter a -> Filter.Filter a -> Filter.Filter a

values.name: test
values.comment: Run an item through a given filter.
